VLLM_ALLOW_LONG_MAX_MODEL_LEN must be used with extreme caution. If the model uses relative position encoding (RoPE), positions exceeding derived_max_model_len lead to nan. If the model uses absolute position encoding, positions exceeding derived_max_model_len will cause a CUDA array out-of-bounds error.
